legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.content:
Please comply with the Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China and related regulations. The following content is strictly prohibited:
• Content that endangers national security or leaks state secrets
• Violent, terrorist, pornographic content
• Content that infringes on intellectual property rights
• Computer viruses, trojans, and other malicious programs
• Other content prohibited by law

Uploaders are legally responsible for their uploaded content. This platform provides technical services only.
